basis: GL-052 Product Core E2E Flow Test
GL-061 Demo Runner / API Smoke Script

productionBlockers.title: Production auth is not implemented
productionBlockers.description: No OAuth, JWT, SSO, or HSM-backed key management exists.

productionBlockers.title: Production secrets are not managed
productionBlockers.description: Demo Ed25519 keypair and synthetic data remain in the repository.

productionBlockers.title: Deployment hardening is not specified
productionBlockers.description: No containers, load balancing, TLS termination, or orchestration guidance exists.

productionBlockers.title: Observability is not implemented
productionBlockers.description: No metrics, logging pipelines, alerting, or tracing exists.

productionBlockers.title: Backup/restore is not defined
productionBlockers.description: No automated backup, point-in-time recovery, or disaster runbooks exist.

productionBlockers.title: PostgreSQL CI is not established
productionBlockers.description: SQLite is the default; PostgreSQL support exists but is not CI-gated.

productionBlockers.title: OpenAPI contract freeze process is not defined
productionBlockers.description: Versioning and breaking-change policy are not documented.

productionBlockers.title: Data privacy and evidence-handling boundaries are not defined
productionBlockers.description: No data-classification matrix or retention policy exists.

pilotPermittedScope: Review docs — read integration guide, demo scenario, walkthroughs, and checklists.
Run dry-run demo smoke script — execute python3 scripts/demo/gl061_api_smoke.py --dry-run for local confidence.
Inspect examples — examine static JSON examples in docs/examples/gl057/ and docs/examples/gl058/.
Run backend tests — execute the full backend suite with expected zero failures and zero errors.
Map partner workflow — translate an internal grant or funding process into GrantLayer stages.
Identify production requirements — produce a ranked list of what production operation would require.

nextRecommendedOptions.title: API/OpenAPI Contract Hardening Review
nextRecommendedOptions.description: Tighten the OpenAPI specification, define versioning, and resolve contract ambiguities.

nextRecommendedOptions.title: Local API Smoke v2
nextRecommendedOptions.description: Extend the GL-061 demo runner to exercise more paths and produce a machine-readable confidence report.
